user_story: As a Manager, I want to view a list of employee actual expenses with added date, title, employee, department, expenses and amount, so that I can review my team's submitted expenses
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Expenses screen; When the list loads; Then each expense shows added on date, title, employee name, department name, expenses, amount and status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter expenses by active or inactive employees, so that I can focus on the relevant employee set
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Expenses screen; When I select Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the list is filtered to that employee status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter expenses by a From and To period, so that I can review expenses within a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Expenses screen; When I pick a From and To date using the calendar and search; Then only expenses within that period are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter expenses by department, so that I can review expenses for a specific department
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Expenses screen; When I select a department and search; Then only expenses for that department are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter expenses by status including Approved, Settled and Closed, Settlement Pending and Pending Acknowledgement states, so that I can track expenses through the full settlement lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Expenses screen; When I select a status such as Settlement Pending from Employee; Then only expenses with that status are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter expenses by amount, so that I can locate expenses of a particular value
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Expenses screen; When I enter an amount and search; Then only expenses matching that amount are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to search and reset the expense filters, so that I can apply criteria and quickly clear them
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then the list reflects my criteria; And when I click Reset; Then all filters return to their defaults
